creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
4. wimlib 1.14.0 has been released. List of changes:
    Removed libxml2 and libcrypto (OpenSSL) as dependencies of wimlib.
Remove USES=gnome and USE_GNOME=libxml2 (need testing).
